hor_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7578587932726938648","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出，后面应该会涨）
【钓鱼佬+爆笑+国安+直播+日常发癫+系统】

凌皓，前大厂牛马，辞职回家，只想做个岁月静好的钓鱼佬。
没想到绑定了【万物垂钓系统】，喜提永不空军因果律。
本以为从此大鱼不断，走上人生巅峰，可画风怎么越来越不对劲？
第一天钓起十年劫案赃款，锦旗+1。
第二天钓出湖底沉尸，老刑警看他的眼神都不对了。
第三天，鱼钩精准挂住了间谍的氧气瓶……
直到他在内陆水库，一竿子干碎了某国的潜航器。
国安连夜上门，神情复杂：“凌先生，请你解释一下。”
凌皓看着鱼钩上的微型潜艇，一脸无辜：
“我说我只是想钓条鲤鱼，这玩意儿自己咬的钩，你信吗？”
从此，他的日常变成：
黑坑老板驱鱼？反手钓出通缉犯。
富豪求破风水？直接拽起沉没运钞车。
直到龙舟大赛，他在全市直播下，钓起了未爆的战争航弹……
全网炸锅，警察跪求：“哥！收了神通吧！去海里钓行不行？”
凌皓叹气：“我只想当个安静的钓鱼佬啊。”
后来——当全球间谍因他失眠，当公海的核潜艇被鱼线绑定坐标。
只想做个钓鱼佬的他，坐在甲板上，对着镜头无奈耸肩：
“家人们谁懂啊？”
“我就想钓条鱼回家煮汤啊，怎么一不小心……成国家级战略武器了？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/77104b0e5f41d307dd70b7db6bed710a","author":"自由d奔跑","author_id":"","book_id":"7578587932726938648","book_name":"一杆一个违禁品？你管这叫钓鱼？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7580926474287333913","read_count":"30407","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"486405"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"206","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,直播,钓鱼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/561452fec21ac8b64311d88ff4af15f0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312567&x-signature=ma5NZxT398hOWNSe%2ByL2OWga%2BjM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2067506814008423","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"101"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205292717E3A48BD203DE1D402A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":25836,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":29595,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":1598},"user_action":{"author":0,
